---
name: "✨ Feature Request"
about: Suggest an enhancement to the action
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]
---

## Feature description
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Use case
Explain the problem this feature would solve. Why do you need it?

## Proposed solution
How would you like the feature to work? Describe the expected behavior.

## Example usage
If applicable, show how you'd use this feature in a workflow:
```yaml
- uses: amarun22-studio/stale-branch-notifier-action@v1
  with:
    # Your example here
```

## Alternative solutions
Have you considered other ways to solve this? Describe them.

## Additional context
Any other context, screenshots, or examples that might be helpful.

## Priority
- [ ] Low (nice to have)
- [ ] Medium (would be useful)
- [ ] High (blocking use case)
